block_00: Action required – Account review and withdrawal process
block_03: Following our last email in relation to your pending withdrawal request, we kindly like to remind you that in order to process your withdrawal request, you need to complete the required account review by following the below instructions.
block_04: It is crucial to note that failure to complete the account review within 15 days from the date of this notice will result in cancellation of the withdrawal request, closure of the trading account, and any open positions, in line with the Company's Terms and Conditions.

block_10: Please do not disconnect the video call unless you completed these steps, otherwise, the review will be considered uncompleted.
